title: T1K Routing Fragment
description: Maps abstract roles to concrete agent names (t1k-routing-*.json). Highest priority wins per role.

priority.description: Merge priority — higher wins per role. Core=10, engine kits=90, module overlays=91+

description.description: Human-readable description of this routing layer

module.description: Module name — only present in module routing overlays (priority >= 91)

kitName.description: Kit identifier — only present in module routing overlays

roles.description: Role-to-agent mapping. Keys are abstract role names, values are concrete agent names.

errorRecovery.description: Maps error types to the role responsible for recovery

additionalProperties.description: Role name that handles this error type
